actionCalls.name: Log_Date_Sent_to_Distribution_Set
actionCalls.label: Log Date Sent to Distribution Set

actionCalls.name: Log_Date_Sent_to_Lab_Set
actionCalls.label: Log Date Sent to Lab Set

actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_Opportunity_Kit_Id_Will_Be_Saved
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - Opportunity Kit Id Will Be Saved

value.stringValue: Kit Id is saved on the Opportunity

actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_Update_Lab_Order_Failed
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - Update Lab Order Failed

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Lab_Order_API_Call_Failed
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Lab Order API Call Failed

value.stringValue: Failed Calling Update Lab Order API Due to an error
Failed in Saving Kit Id on Opportunity

actionCalls.name: Log_Failed_to_create_collection_of_requested_items
actionCalls.label: Log Failed to create collection of requested items

value.stringValue: Failed to create collection of requested items, Lab Order status set to Order Held. Error {!Get_Serviceable_Items.txt_ErrorMessage}.
Record Trigger - Lab Order - Kit Has Been Registered - Submit Lab Update Flow Started

actionCalls.name: Log_Info_Lab_Order_API_Call_Failed
actionCalls.label: Log - Info - Lab Order API Call Failed

actionCalls.name: Log_Info_Not_Posted_to_Lab
actionCalls.label: Log - Info - Not Posted to Lab

value.stringValue: Lab Order Already Registered with the Lab

actionCalls.name: Log_Submit_GT_Order_Action_Failed
actionCalls.label: Log Submit GT Order Action Failed

assignments.name: Set_Dates_on_Lab_Order_Success
assignments.label: Set Dates on Lab Order - Success

assignments.name: Set_Error_Message_Failed_Requested_Items
assignments.label: Set Error Message - Failed Requested Items

assignments.description: We set the gender from the Map Collection
assignments.name: Set_Gender
assignments.label: Set Gender

decisions.name: Did_we_fail_at_creating_the_requested_Items
decisions.label: Did we fail at creating the requested Items

decisions.description: Here we do a check to ensure that we haven't posted to the lab before. If we have we do not want to POST again to the Lab. This would end up creating a duplicate in the lab's database.
decisions.name: Have_We_Submitted_the_Order_to_the_Lab
decisions.label: Have We Submitted the Order to the Lab?
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Lab Order hasn't been sent to the lab.

rules.name: Lab_Order_has_ben_sent_to_the_Lab
rules.label: Lab Order has ben sent to the Lab

decisions.description: We now will check if the Gender is set on the account. If it is then we won't set it otherwise we will come and set the value for gender based on what the customer has entered.
decisions.name: Is_Account_Gender_Set
decisions.label: Is Account Gender Set

decisions.description: In case Date Sent To Distribution is blank (In Person Kits) we set the date here for uniformity
decisions.name: Is_Date_Sent_To_Distribution_Empty
decisions.label: Is Date Sent To Distribution Empty

decisions.description: If the Kit Id is not set when they are registered we will set the kit id on the opportunity
decisions.name: Is_Opportunity_Kit_Id_Set
decisions.label: Is Opportunity Kit Id Set
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Kit Id is Already Set on Opportunity

rules.name: Kit_Id_is_Blank_on_the_Opportunity
rules.label: Kit Id is Blank on the Opportunity

Flow.description: This flow will run anytime that a kit has been registered after the kit has been received by the warehouse. By making this API call this will let them know that we have the patient details.
Flow.interviewLabel: Record Trigger - Lab Order - Kit Has Been Registered - Submit Lab Update {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Record Trigger - Lab Order - Kit Has Been Registered - Submit Lab Update
